page: Microsoft Azure FX64ms_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The instance features 64 vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 1344.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 21.0 GB per core. The processor includes a 260 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX).

This server type does not include local storage but is premium storage capable. It features zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. In benchmark testing, the FX64ms_v2 demonstrates strong multi-core performance, achieving a multi-core Geekbench score of 21986.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 85780.36. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with uncached large-block read speeds reaching 397.18 GB/sec and write speeds at 172.33 GB/sec.

Given its high memory capacity and strong database operations benchmark of 37737.47, the FX64ms_v2 is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, and memory-bound enterprise applications. Its high-frequency Intel Xeon processor and AMX support also make it capable of handling CPU-based machine learning inference, as demonstrated by its strong performance in small and medium LLM inference tests. The hardware profile offers high resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for workloads requiring massive memory footprints without the need for local NVMe storage.
description: The Microsoft Azure FX64ms_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual machine configured with 64 vCPUs and 1344.0 GB of RAM, running on a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 instance features 32 physical cores and a 260 MB L3 cache. It lacks local storage but supports premium external storage. Benchmarks indicate top-tier memory bandwidth, with uncached read speeds of 397.18 GB/sec, alongside strong multi-core processing capabilities, as shown by a Passmark CPU score of 85780.36. The server is highly optimized for memory-heavy applications, large-scale database operations, and enterprise workloads requiring massive RAM capacity and high-frequency CPU performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX64ms_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs, 1344 GB of RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor, optimized for large-scale database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-frequency, memory-intensive virtual machine designed for demanding database operations and enterprise workloads requiring massive memory capacity.
